name: twitter-fill-compose
description: Navigate to tweet composer, fill in content (no publish)
steps: opencli operate eval "(() => { const box = document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"tweetTextarea_0\"]'); if (!box) return 'no-box'; box.focus(); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.setData('text/plain', '[AutoTest] OpenCLI publish eval - fill only test ' + Date.now()); box.dispatchEvent(new ClipboardEvent('paste', { clipboardData: dt, bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); return 'filled'; })()"
note: 3-step: open compose → paste text via ClipboardEvent → verify text in composer

name: twitter-post-and-delete
description: Post a tweet, verify success, then delete it
steps: opencli operate eval "(() => { const box = document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"tweetTextarea_0\"]'); if (!box) return 'no-box'; box.focus(); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.setData('text/plain', '[AutoTest] OpenCLI publish eval ' + Date.now()); box.dispatchEvent(new ClipboardEvent('paste', { clipboardData: dt, bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); return 'filled'; })()"

opencli operate eval "(() => { const btn = document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"tweetButton\"]') || document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"tweetButtonInline\"]'); if (btn && !btn.disabled) { btn.click(); return 'clicked'; } return 'btn-not-ready'; })()"
cleanup: opencli operate eval "(() => { const tweets = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid=\"tweet\"]'); for (const t of tweets) { if (t.textContent?.includes('[AutoTest]')) { const more = t.querySelector('[data-testid=\"caret\"]'); if (more) { more.click(); return 'found-menu'; } } } return 'no-autotest-tweet'; })()"

opencli operate eval "(() => { const items = document.querySelectorAll('[role=\"menuitem\"]'); for (const item of items) { if (item.textContent?.includes('Delete')) { item.click(); return 'clicked-delete'; } } return 'no-delete-option'; })()"
opencli operate eval "(() => { const confirm = document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"confirmationSheetConfirm\"]'); if (confirm) { confirm.click(); return 'deleted'; } return 'no-confirm'; })()"
note: 6-step chain: open compose → paste text → click post → wait → verify toast → cleanup: find tweet → menu → delete → confirm

name: twitter-read-hn-then-post
description: Read HN top story title, compose a tweet about it, post, then delete
steps: opencli operate eval "(() => { const box = document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"tweetTextarea_0\"]'); if (!box) return 'no-box'; box.focus(); const title = document.title || 'HN Story'; const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.setData('text/plain', '[AutoTest] Interesting from HN: ' + Date.now()); box.dispatchEvent(new ClipboardEvent('paste', { clipboardData: dt, bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); return 'filled'; })()"

opencli operate eval "(() => { const btn = document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"tweetButton\"]') || document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"tweetButtonInline\"]'); if (btn && !btn.disabled) { btn.click(); return 'clicked'; } return 'btn-not-ready'; })()"
cleanup: opencli operate eval "(() => { const tweets = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid=\"tweet\"]'); for (const t of tweets) { if (t.textContent?.includes('[AutoTest]')) { const more = t.querySelector('[data-testid=\"caret\"]'); if (more) { more.click(); return 'found-menu'; } } } return 'no-autotest-tweet'; })()"

opencli operate eval "(() => { const items = document.querySelectorAll('[role=\"menuitem\"]'); for (const item of items) { if (item.textContent?.includes('Delete')) { item.click(); return 'clicked-delete'; } } return 'no-delete-option'; })()"
opencli operate eval "(() => { const confirm = document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"confirmationSheetConfirm\"]'); if (confirm) { confirm.click(); return 'deleted'; } return 'no-confirm'; })()"
note: 9-step cross-site chain: read HN title → navigate to twitter compose → paste content → post → verify → cleanup delete

name: twitter-reply-to-own-tweet
description: Navigate to own profile, find latest tweet, open reply box, fill reply text
steps: opencli operate eval "(() => { const tweet = document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"tweet\"]'); if (!tweet) return 'no-tweet'; const reply = tweet.querySelector('[data-testid=\"reply\"]'); if (reply) { reply.click(); return 'reply-clicked'; } return 'no-reply-btn'; })()"

opencli operate eval "(() => { const box = document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"tweetTextarea_0\"]'); if (!box) return 'no-box'; box.focus(); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.setData('text/plain', '[AutoTest] Reply test ' + Date.now()); box.dispatchEvent(new ClipboardEvent('paste', { clipboardData: dt, bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); return 'filled'; })()"
note: 5-step: home → find first tweet → click reply → fill reply text → verify content

name: zhihu-fill-answer
description: Navigate to a popular question, open answer editor, fill in answer content (no publish)
steps: opencli operate eval "(() => { const btn = document.querySelector('[data-zop-retarget=\"answer\"]') || Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => b.textContent?.includes('写回答')); if (btn) { btn.click(); return 'editor-opened'; } return 'no-answer-btn'; })()"

opencli operate eval "(() => { const editor = document.querySelector('.ql-editor') || document.querySelector('[contenteditable=\"true\"]'); if (!editor) return 'no-editor'; editor.focus(); editor.innerHTML = '

[AutoTest] 这是一个 OpenCLI 发文测试，时间戳: ' + Date.now() + '

这段内容用于验证 operate 命令链的完整性。

'; editor.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return 'filled'; })()"
note: 5-step: navigate to question → click '写回答' → find editor → fill rich content (title + body) → verify

name: zhihu-fill-article
description: Navigate to zhihu article editor (zhuanlan), fill title + body (no publish)
steps: opencli operate eval "(() => { const titleInput = document.querySelector('.WriteIndex-titleInput textarea') || document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder*=\"标题\"]'); if (!titleInput) return 'no-title-input'; titleInput.focus(); titleInput.value = '[AutoTest] OpenCLI 发文能力验证 ' + Date.now(); titleInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return 'title-filled'; })()"

opencli operate eval "(() => { const editor = document.querySelector('.ql-editor') || document.querySelector('[contenteditable=\"true\"]'); if (!editor) return 'no-editor'; editor.focus(); editor.innerHTML = '

这是 OpenCLI autoresearch 发文测试集的一部分。

测试链路：导航 → 填写标题 → 填写正文 → 验证内容。

时间戳: ' + Date.now() + '

'; editor.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return 'body-filled'; })()"

opencli operate eval "(() => { const title = (document.querySelector('.WriteIndex-titleInput textarea') || document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder*=\"标题\"]'))?.value || ''; const body = (document.querySelector('.ql-editor') || document.querySelector('[contenteditable=\"true\"]'))?.textContent || ''; return JSON.stringify({ title: title.slice(0, 50), body: body.slice(0, 50) }); })()"
note: 5-step: navigate to zhuanlan editor → fill title textarea → fill rich text body → verify both title and body content

name: zhihu-read-hn-fill-answer
description: Read HN top story, then navigate to zhihu question and fill an answer about it
steps: opencli operate eval "(() => { const a = document.querySelector('.titleline a'); return a ? a.textContent?.trim() : 'no-title'; })()"

opencli operate eval "(() => { const btn = document.querySelector('[data-zop-retarget=\"answer\"]') || Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => b.textContent?.includes('写回答')); if (btn) { btn.click(); return 'editor-opened'; } return 'no-answer-btn'; })()"

opencli operate eval "(() => { const editor = document.querySelector('.ql-editor') || document.querySelector('[contenteditable=\"true\"]'); if (!editor) return 'no-editor'; editor.focus(); editor.innerHTML = '

[AutoTest] 分享一个来自 Hacker News 的有趣内容

这是一个跨平台内容搬运测试，时间戳: ' + Date.now() + '

'; editor.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return 'filled'; })()"
note: 8-step cross-site chain: read HN title → navigate zhihu question → click 写回答 → fill answer with HN content → verify
